sourcesContent:
"use client" import { useContext } from "react" import { ProfileContext } from "../../context/profile/ProfileContext" import Spinner from "../layout/Spinner" const AnalyticsDashboard = () => { const { profile, githubStats, mediumArticles, leetcodeStats, hackerrankStats, loading } = useContext(ProfileContext) if (loading || !profile) { return } // Calculate total contributions across platforms const totalContributions = { github: githubStats ? githubStats.publicRepos + githubStats.publicGists + (githubStats.topRepos?.reduce((sum, repo) => sum + repo.stars + repo.forks, 0) || 0) : 0, medium: mediumArticles ? mediumArticles.length : 0, leetcode: leetcodeStats ? leetcodeStats.totalSolved : 0, hackerrank: hackerrankStats ? hackerrankStats.successfulSubmissions : 0, } const totalPlatformContributions = Object.values(totalContributions).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) return (

Developer Analytics Dashboard

Platforms

{profile.platforms.length}

GitHub Repos

{githubStats?.publicRepos || 0}

LeetCode Problems

{leetcodeStats?.totalSolved || 0}

Medium Articles

{mediumArticles?.length || 0}

Contribution Distribution

{totalPlatformContributions > 0 ? ( <>
) : (
No contributions yet
)}
GitHub
Medium
LeetCode
HackerRank

Tech Stack

{profile.techStack.map((tech, index) => ( {tech} ))}
) } export default AnalyticsDashboard
